local_validation.summary: High-traffic orientation docs now name Form-native route/runtime work as the architectural center and keep Python references in bridge, tooling, source-specific proof, or historical-evidence lanes. README-derived surfaces were regenerated from README.template.md and docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md; generated indexes now label api/app/routers as the compatibility bridge/upstream tail.

ci_validation.reason: No commit or PR created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: Documentation-only pass; no production deploy performed.

phase_gate.reason: Local documentation validation passed, but CI/deploy validation has not run for this uncommitted worktree.

evidence_refs: AGENTS.md project summary now names Form-native grammar -> recipes/cells -> sibling kernels -> observed route/runtime proof as the architectural center.
docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md now carries the Form-native magnet rule: Python references stay only for bridge/upstream behavior, operational tooling, or historical evidence.
README.template.md and regenerated README/CLI/MCP/skill surfaces now present Form-native runtime and native-kernel routes before FastAPI/Python bridge wording.
kernels/SOURCE_LANGUAGE_KERNEL_ROUTER_ARCHITECTURE.md and kernels/KERNEL_AS_ROUTER.md now state Python as a temporary handler carrier/upstream, not route identity or front-door destination.
docs/PLAN.md and docs/STATUS.md now put Form-native/BML route promotion into the active priority/status surface.
kernels/SOURCE_LANGUAGE_KERNEL_ROUTER_TRACKING.md now frames existing FastAPI bodies as bridge friction and BML/domain handlers as the direction of travel.
docs/coherence-substrate/self-hosted-eval.md now names remaining Python pieces as bridge/bootstrap carriers and points mutation toward Form-native storage ports.
docs/SETUP.md now labels the local API process as the compatibility API and points native route work to the kernel router docs.
kernels/PYTHON_PIPELINE_STATUS.md now reads as source-language to Form-native status, with Python-source demos preserved as the first proof set rather than the center.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A fresh agent reading the primary orientation docs is pulled toward Form-native handlers and sees Python as bridge/tool/history rather than the target runtime.
test_flows: README-derived surfaces regenerated from the edited template/start packet
focused wording scan no longer finds stale Python-primary phrases in the edited orientation surfaces
